issue.body:
Tracks: #36
Spec: pd-book-tools/docs/specs/08-geometry-repr.md

Add `Point.__repr__` that returns `Point(x, y)` as a simple positional form.

## Acceptance

- `repr(Point(3, 7))` returns `"Point(3, 7)"`
- `repr(Point(0.5, 0.5))` returns `"Point(0.5, 0.5)"`
- Existing tests still pass

Tracks: #36
Spec: pd-book-tools/docs/specs/08-geometry-repr.md
